title: On The Morals Of Poets
content:
One says he is immoral, and points out
    Warm sin in ruddy specks upon his soul:
    Bigot, one folly of the man you flout
    Is more to God than thy lean life is whole.
meaning:
Richard Le Gallienne's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On The Morals Of Poets"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
